title: Forget Coders. The Real A.I. Threat Is in the Back Office.
description: As artificial intelligence spreads, millions of middle-class jobs in human resources, billing and payroll could be at risk. Most are held by women.
content:
If artificial intelligence disrupts the job market, which workers will be most vulnerable?
The obvious answer, and the one that has dominated public debate over A.I. job loss in recent months, is that the workers most at risk are programmers, softwar... [1421 chars]

title: Is A.I. affecting your career? We want to hear from you.
description: The New York Times wants to talk to workers about what they think artificial intelligence will mean for their careers, and how they are navigating this uncertain period.
content:
Artificial intelligence will change the American workplace. But exactly how it will do that remains unclear.
New York Times economics reporters want to understand how A.I. is affecting people’s careers and career decisions. If you’re looking for work... [449 chars]

title: Ads in New York must now label AI-generated 'synthetic performers'
description: Any advertisements in New York that feature artificial intelligence-generated people in place of actors will now be violating state law if they don't clearly label that they have used a "synthetic performer."
content:
Any advertisements in New York that feature artificial intelligence-generated people in place of actors will now be violating state law if they don't clearly label that they have used a "synthetic performer.”

title: What ChatGPT maker OpenAI's IPO plans mean for the future
description: OpenAI, the creator of ChatGPT, filed confidentially for a public listing on Monday, following a similar filing by rival Anthropic last week, as AI developers compete to cash in on surging investor interest in artificial intelligence.

title: AI should empower workers, not displace them, says Ramanan
description: PETALING JAYA: Malaysia is committed to ensuring that artificial intelligence (AI) serves workers rather than replaces them, says Datuk Seri R. Ramanan.
content:

title: From finance to leadership: How technology is shaping smarter decisions
description: Artificial intelligence is transforming finance and leadership. AI tools now help analyse risks, detect fraud, and automate tasks. Leaders must combine technology insights with human values for effective decision-making. New programmes are available to build these essential skills for a data-driven future. Organisations that blend intelligent decisions with thoughtful leadership will gain a competitive edge.
